theme: Compute a diffusion cheaply via structure
title: Community Diffusion: Minimal-Op Circuit for a Saturating Fixed Point
strategies: per-agent, per-individual-edge, per-round dense simulation from x^(0)=0 (trivial baseline)
per-community aggregate sums reused across agents each round, but still re-deriving one node per agent (greedy, the obvious CSE optimization)

collapse the N-agent dynamics to its true K-dimensional community quotient (automorphism of the symmetric start state), bake multiplicities into single constants, broadcast the K representatives to all N agents for free (strong)
cross-round algebraic shortcuts / closed-form saturation-time circuits below the K-dimensional bound (open ceiling, uncovered)
